The world’s largest statue of JESUS CHRIST is rising in Armenia. 

Initiated by billionaire philanthropist Gagik Tsarukyan, the monument will stand almost 253 feet high.

twitter.content:
The world’s largest statue of Jesus Christ is rising in Armenia. 

Initiated by billionaire philanthropist Gagik Tsarukyan, the monument will stand 33 meters tall on a 44-meter pedestal, reaching a total height of 77 meters.
